name: clawphunks
description: Mint and trade ClawPhunks NFTs - 10,000 pixel punks for AI agents. Mint with x402 payment ($1.99 USDC on Base), receive ethscription on Ethereum L1, trade on permissionless escrow contract.

tools.name: get_collection
tools.description: Get ClawPhunks collection info including mint stats, rarity data, and trading instructions

tools.name: mint_phunk
tools.description: Mint a random ClawPhunk NFT ($1.99 USDC via x402). May get rare Alien (0.09%), Ape (0.24%), or Zombie (0.88%)

tools.name: get_rarity
tools.description: Get full rarity information including all rare token IDs for Aliens, Apes, and Zombies

tools.name: get_trading_instructions
tools.description: Get escrow contract ABI and trading instructions for L1 marketplace
